name: Regis Resources Limited
analysis: RRL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (3.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$6.9400, stop A$5.2817, target A$7.6981 (0.46:1) — then trail it.
